scripts.build:js: npx terser assets/js/pricing.js -o assets/js/pricing.min.js -c -m && npx terser assets/js/kpi-calculator.js -o assets/js/kpi-calculator.min.js -c -m && npx terser assets/js/tracking.js -o assets/js/tracking.min.js -c -m && npx terser assets/js/quiz.js -o assets/js/quiz.min.js -c -m
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js
